languages.text: "Это лишь малая часть процессии, Лорд-капитан. Мастер Дисциплины проверила и лично отобрала самых смирных и благонадежных. Пустить на мостик все шествие, которое устроили на палубах, невозможно — и крайне небезопасно".

traits.locale_text: "Аудиенция была запрошена по всем правилам, Лорд-капитан. Мастер Дисциплины проверила каждого из процессии лично и отобрала самых благонадежных. Это лишь малая часть того шествия, которое устроили на палубах".

languages.text: "This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."
languages.original_text: "Это лишь малая часть процессии, Лорд-капитан. Мастер Дисциплины проверила и лично отобрала самых смирных и благонадежных. Пустить на мостик все шествие, которое устроили на палубах, невозможно — и крайне небезопасно".

traits.locale_text: "This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

"This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

"An audience was requested in proper accordance with all protocols, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally scrutinised each member of the procession and selected the most trustworthy. This is only a small part of the procession that has been organised on the other decks."

"This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

"This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

languages.text: 「お呼び出しは、すべてのプロトコルに従って行われました、艦長殿。マスター・アット・アームズは、儀仗隊の隊員一人一人を、自ら厳しく審査し、最も信頼できる者を選んで、この小さな隊列を編成しました。これは、他の甲板で編成された隊列の一部に過ぎません」
languages.original_text: "An audience was requested in proper accordance with all protocols, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally scrutinised each member of the procession and selected the most trustworthy. This is only a small part of the procession that has been organised on the other decks."

languages.text: "Bu, alayın sadece küçük bir kısmı Lord Kaptan. Silahtar, en istikrarlı ve güvenilir olanları bizzat seçip inceledi. Yürüyüşteki herkesin diğer güvertelerden köprüye geçmesine izin vermek imkânsız... Ya da en azından son derece güvensiz olurdu."
languages.original_text: "This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

traits.locale_text: "Bu, alayın sadece küçük bir kısmı Lord Kaptan. Silahtar, en istikrarlı ve güvenilir olanları bizzat seçip inceledi. Yürüyüşteki herkesin diğer güvertelerden köprüye geçmesine izin vermek imkânsız... Ya da en azından son derece güvensiz olurdu."

languages.text: “这只是队伍的一小部分，舰长大人。戒律大师亲自挑选出最稳当、最可靠的人，并进行了严密的审查。要是让整支队伍从其他甲板行进到舰桥，那几乎不可能——至少是极不安全的。”
languages.original_text: "This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

traits.locale_text: “这只是队伍的一小部分，舰长大人。戒律大师亲自挑选出最稳当、最可靠的人，并进行了严密的审查。要是让整支队伍从其他甲板行进到舰桥，那几乎不可能——至少是极不安全的。”

languages.text: "Das ist nur ein kleiner Teil der Prozession, Lord Captain. Die Waffenmeisterin hat persönlich die stabilsten und vertrauenswürdigsten Leute ausgewählt. Es wäre unmöglich, den gesamten Marsch von den anderen Decks auf die Brücke zu gestatten ... oder zumindest ausgesprochen unsicher."
languages.original_text: "This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

traits.locale_text: "Das ist nur ein kleiner Teil der Prozession, Lord Captain. Die Waffenmeisterin hat persönlich die stabilsten und vertrauenswürdigsten Leute ausgewählt. Es wäre unmöglich, den gesamten Marsch von den anderen Decks auf die Brücke zu gestatten ... oder zumindest ausgesprochen unsicher."

languages.text: « Ce n'en est qu'une infime partie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. La capitaine d'armes a personnellement choisi et passé en revue les membres les plus stables et dignes de confiance. La passerelle n'est pas en mesure d'accueillir l'intégralité du défilé, en tout cas pas sans courir de risques. »
languages.original_text: "This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'en est qu'une infime partie, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. La capitaine d'armes a personnellement choisi et passé en revue les membres les plus stables et dignes de confiance. La passerelle n'est pas en mesure d'accueillir l'intégralité du défilé, en tout cas pas sans courir de risques. »

languages.text: «Es solo una pequeña parte de la comitiva, Lord Capitán. La maestra de armas investigó y eligió a los más estables y dignos de confianza. Permitir que todo el gentío de las otras cubiertas entrara al puente sería inconcebible... o al menos muy peligroso».
languages.original_text: "This is only a small part of the procession, Lord Captain. The Master-at-Arms personally selected and scrutinised the most stable and trustworthy. To allow the entire march from the other decks onto the bridge would be impossible — or at least highly unsafe."
